queries.question: Show me the topics that each health reporter covers.
queries.sql: SELECT Topics.Name  from Health_Reporters_Topics join Topics on Health_Reporters_Topics.TopicID = Topics.TopicID join Health_Reporters on Health_Reporters_Topics.ReporterID = Health_Reporters.ReporterID   GROUP BY Health_Reporters_Topics.TopicID HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Health_Reporters_Topics.ReporterID) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Health_Reporters)

queries.question: Show me the topics that each health reporter covers.
queries.sql: select health_reporters.name , topics.name from Health_Reporters_Topics join Topics on Health_Reporters_Topics.TopicID = Topics.TopicID join Health_Reporters on Health_Reporters_Topics.ReporterID = Health_Reporters.ReporterID
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?name2 WHERE {
  ?health_reporters_topics a :Health_Reporters_Topics .
  ?topics a :topics .
  ?health_reporters_topics p:hasTopics ?topics .
  ?health_reporters a :Health_Reporters .
  ?health_reporters_topics p:hasHealth_Reporters ?health_reporters .
  ?health_reporters p:name ?name .
  ?topics p:name ?name2 .
}
